name: Ernest Chuang
notes: Content engine for stock trading app. Single-system, 5-pillar pitch. Targets 10-20K app downloads.

timeline.event: Discovery call — discussed content engine for stock trading app growth
Sales script, pitch deck, and proposal generated — 5-pillar content engine, $7,500 one-time / $2,500/mo managed
Follow-up sent. Ernest said he's waiting on another firm's pricing.
Applied urgency. Ernest acknowledged, said he'd keep us posted.
Deal lost — Ernest went with a local firm (slightly higher price, but proximity won). Reason: 'they're local, just easier.'

current_status: Lost to local competitor. Ernest chose a higher-priced local firm for convenience/proximity. No price objection — purely a locality preference. Door left open if things change.
loss_reason: Competitor was local (proximity). No price advantage — they were actually higher.
